title: Lepiurus
taxonomy: Lepiurus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Caryophyllaceae. They are commonly known as birds' eye grasses or bird's-eye cresses. Lepiurus species are native to Europe, North Africa, and Asia. The classification of Lepiurus includes annual or biennial herbs with small, white or pink flowers. Lepiurus species are often found in dry to moist meadows and along roadsides.

intro: Lepiurus is a genus of flowering plants, commonly known as Joint Pineapple or Needle Grass, native to Africa and Asia.
